investigation_summary: 2024: BAT pleaded guilty to IEEPA conspiracy — $635M criminal penalty — 11-year scheme selling cigarettes to North Korea via fronts. MSA participant; DOJ RICO racketeering findings (industry-wide). FTC American Spirit "natural" scrutiny. Youth vaping enforcement thread on Vuse.

profile.tax_summary: BAT ~22–25% effective; Reynolds standard US structure.
profile.legal_summary: North Korea sanctions guilty plea; tobacco RICO; menthol disparities; American Spirit claims; vaping enforcement.
profile.environmental_summary: Tobacco agriculture & waste; not primary headline vs sanctions/health.
profile.political_summary: Tobacco industry political footprint historically massive.
profile.product_health: Combustible cigarettes; menthol targeted marketing in Black communities per public-health literature.
profile.executive_summary: BAT global leadership; Reynolds US operating history.
